penalties.description: Maximum time reached before completion. Task appears incomplete based on video evidence.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: Major disagreement between models on task completion. Claude reported incomplete task with maximum time penalty, while GPT reported successful completion in 72 seconds. Given the fundamental nature of this disagreement and the automatic-zero condition for incomplete tasks, the conservative interpretation (incomplete) is applied per rubric requirements.
